parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', message: 'Backup warning sequence started' }) }}

parameters.command: docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli title @a times 10 70 20 && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli title @a title '{"text":"⚠ BACKUP","color":"gold","bold":true}' && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli title @a subtitle '{"text":"Server shutting down in 2 minutes!","color":"yellow"}' && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli tellraw @a '["",{"text":"[Backup] ","color":"gold","bold":true},{"text":"Server shutting down for backup in 2 minutes!","color":"yellow"}]' && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli playsound minecraft:block.note_block.pling master @a ~ ~ ~ 1 1

docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli title @a times 10 70 20 && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli title @a title '{"text":"⚠ BACKUP","color":"gold","bold":true}' && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli title @a subtitle '{"text":"Server shutting down in 1 minute!","color":"yellow"}' && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli tellraw @a '["",{"text":"[Backup] ","color":"gold","bold":true},{"text":"Server shutting down for backup in 1 minute!","color":"yellow"}]' && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli playsound minecraft:block.note_block.pling master @a ~ ~ ~ 1 1

docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli title @a times 10 70 20 && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli title @a title '{"text":"⚠ BACKUP","color":"red","bold":true}' && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli title @a subtitle '{"text":"Server shutting down in 10 seconds!","color":"yellow"}' && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli tellraw @a '["",{"text":"[Backup] ","color":"red","bold":true},{"text":"Server shutting down in 10 seconds!","color":"yellow"}]' && docker exec minecraft-mh rcon-cli playsound minecraft:block.note_block.bell master @a ~ ~ ~ 1 1

parameters.content:
## Minecraft MH - Backup Warning

SSHes into orion-dev as a service user and runs `rcon-cli` commands
to warn all online players before the server shuts down for backup.

**Webhook:** POST /webhook/minecraft-mh-backup-warning

**Credential required:** "orion-dev service user" (SSH password or key)
- The service user must be in the `docker` group on orion-dev

**Warning sequence:**
- T+0s — 2 minute warning (gold)
- T+60s — 1 minute warning (gold)
- T+90s — 30 second warning (red)
- T+110s — 10 second warning (red)
- T+120s — Shutdown NOW! (dark red)
